mapper.insert: INSERT INTO company_employee(company_id, name, id_card, job_position, entry_date, is_active, create_time, update_time) VALUES(#{companyId}, #{name}, #{idCard}, #{jobPosition}, #{entryDate}, #{isActive}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM company_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM company_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_active = #{isActive} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM company_employee WHERE company_id = #{companyId} AND is_active = 1
